---
title: "DedooseR"
description: "Streamlines analysis of qualitative data exported from Dedoose. Supports thematic saturation monitoring, code frequencies, dynamic codebooks, and code network maps."
image: ../../img/packages/dedooser.png
order: 6
categories: [qualitative, analysis, CRAN]
href: https://abiraahmi.github.io/DedooseR/
---

[Visit website →](https://abiraahmi.github.io/DedooseR/){.pkg-link target="_blank"}
